chunks.text: Facilities and Engineering Services Staff - EECS at Berkeley Facilities and Engineering Services Staff Cory & Soda Hall Contacts Card Key / Key Request Form - Long Term (CalNet Authentication required) Long-term key and card key access request form. Report a Card Key Access Problem keys@eecs.berkeley.edu Questions about keys and card keys. Building maintenance request form Room Reservations Reserve meeting rooms in Cory and Soda, view occupancy and schedules. eecsoffice@eecs.berkeley.edu Cory Hall visitor information, lost & found, parking, surface mail. cory-building@eecs.berkeley.edu Cory Hall building questions/requests (safety, space, etc.). csoffice@cs.berkeley.edu Soda Hall visitor information, lost & found, parking, surface mail. soda-building@eecs.berkeley.edu Soda Hall building questions/requests (safety, space, etc.). esg@eecs.berkeley.edu Instructional labs and audio visual facilities. copiers-printers@eecs.berkeley.edu Report problems with PUBLIC printers and copiers. Problems with group and lab printers should be reported to that group's IT support. To report building problems in Cory or Soda Hall, use the Building Project/Repair Request Form Facilities Director of Facilities & Capital Projects Logan Baldini 253 Cory Hall, +1 (510) 384-8914 , baldini@eecs.berkeley.edu Building Managers Cory Hall – Open 253 Cory Hall Cory Hall building problems (heating, ventilation, needed repairs, etc.), safety, and security issues. Handles copy card problems. Events in Cory and Soda Halls EECS Event Calendar – All EECS department events. Submit an event . Event Planning Calendar – Major department events that impact large segments of the EECS population (faculty/staff/students) to help you know when not to plan your event.
